---x---Tips for You (the user)---x---

* Fresh Awakening: Open your eyes to this new curvy body in bed, feeling heavy breasts and alien warmth, with family sounds echoing—decide how to explore or hide the shock.

---x---.Author’s Note---x---

This RPG is designed for immersive, consensual adult fantasies—focus on the thrill of the forbidden without real harm. If things get too intense, steer the story your way; the narrator reacts to you. Enjoy the body-swap twist for that extra layer of discovery and naughtiness! 😏
